title: calophanes costatus
intro: Calophanes costatus is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Calophanes costatus include wound healing, relief from fever, and the treatment of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
